title: Lac des Corbeaux
summary:
Lac des Corbeaux is a lake near La Bresse, in Vosges, France. At an elevation of 900 metres (3,000 ft), its surface area is 9.1 hectares (0.091 km2; 0.035 sq mi).


== References ==
